name: Cream of Wheat Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray griddle with cooking spray.
2. In a bowl, combine pancake mix and cereal.
3. Blend milk, egg, and vegetable oil; stir into cereal mixture.
4. Pour scant 1/4 cup batter onto hot griddle for each pancake.
5. Cook until bubbly, then turn and cook until golden brown.
6. Repeat with remaining batter.
